# Modrzejewski.IT - Portfolio and Technical Content
> Salesforce Solution Architect focused on enterprise architecture, integration patterns, and CRM/data activation.

## Key Sections
- [Home](https://modrzejewski.it/): Profile overview and featured highlights.
- [Blog](https://modrzejewski.it/blog): Visitor-oriented technical articles.
- [Tags](https://modrzejewski.it/tags): Tag cloud with topic-based navigation.
- [Blog Index (Machine)](https://modrzejewski.it/llm/blog): Plain links to all published blog posts.
- [Project Index (Machine)](https://modrzejewski.it/llm/projects): Plain links to project case studies.
- [About Me](https://modrzejewski.it/about-me): Experience and credentials.
- [Contact](https://modrzejewski.it/contact): Contact form.

## Tag Navigation Pattern
- Tag detail pages follow: `https://modrzejewski.it/tags/<tag-slug>`
- Example: `https://modrzejewski.it/tags/salesforce`

## Content Focus
- Salesforce architecture and delivery
- Integration design and API patterns
- Data platform activation and governance

## Recent Blog Posts
- [Server-Side Processing of Form Handlers in Marketing Cloud Next](https://modrzejewski.it/blog/server-side-processing-of-form-handlers-in-marketing-cloud-next)
- [How to Debug Salesforce Automation Event-Triggered Flows](https://modrzejewski.it/blog/the-missing-link-how-to-debug-salesforce-automation-event-triggered-flows)
- [A Pivotal Shift in Salesforce Data 360 Pricing](https://modrzejewski.it/blog/unlocking-the-enterprise-data-360-a-pivotal-shift-in-salesforce-data-cloud-pricing)

## Extended Index
- [Detailed LLM Index](https://modrzejewski.it/llms-full.txt): Expanded metadata for blog posts and projects.
